title: selaginella stolonifera
intro: Selaginella stolonifera, also known as Spikemoss or Peacock's Spikemoss, is a species of fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella stolonifera include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
